pt-BR.fpc.dialog.not_found.title: Free Pascal nao encontrado
pt-BR.fpc.dialog.not_found.message: O compilador Free Pascal (FPC) nao foi encontrado na sua maquina.
pt-BR.fpc.dialog.not_found.detail: O FPC e necessario para compilar e executar programas Pascal. Deseja abrir a pagina de download?
pt-BR.fpc.dialog.install.title: Instrucoes de instalacao
pt-BR.fpc.dialog.install.detail:
1. Conclua a instalacao normalmente
2. Reinicie o Pascoal
3. Tente executar novamente
pt-BR.fpc.error.not_found: FPC nao encontrado. Instale o Free Pascal e tente novamente.

en-US.fpc.dialog.not_found.title: Free Pascal not found
en-US.fpc.dialog.not_found.message: The Free Pascal compiler (FPC) was not found on your machine.
en-US.fpc.dialog.not_found.detail: FPC is required to compile and run Pascal programs. Would you like to open the download page?
en-US.fpc.dialog.install.title: Installation instructions
en-US.fpc.dialog.install.detail:
1. Complete the installation normally
2. Restart Pascoal
3. Try running again
en-US.fpc.error.not_found: FPC not found. Install Free Pascal and try again.
